---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? (1-2 sentences)

## Proposal

Your solution. Keep it minimal and focused.

## Alternatives

What else did you consider?

## Context

Any additional context or examples.

## Checklist

- [ ] This aligns with the project's minimal philosophy
- [ ] This is not a social feature (likes/comments/followers)
- [ ] This does not introduce heavy dependencies
